headline: Analysts upgrade Elevance, Centene shares as Medicaid margins expected to recover
summary: Investing.com -- Bank of America upgraded Elevance Health and gave Centene Corporation a double upgrade on Wednesday amid growing confidence that Medicaid margins are nearing a trough and are set to recover over the next several years.

headline: B of A Securities Upgrades Elevance Health to Buy, Raises Price Target to $435
summary: B of A Securities  analyst Kevin Fischbeck   upgrades Elevance Health (NYSE:ELV) from Neutral to Buy and raises the price target from $405 to $435.
